falsification_conditions.condition: The asset's price increases by 15% or more over the next 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: A sustained upward move would contradict the pattern's implied bearish bias and invalidate the 'HOLD' signal.

falsification_conditions.condition: Trading volume exceeds 200% of the 90-day average volume
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: Such a surge in volume would indicate strong buying pressure, refuting the current 'HOLD' stance and suggesting a potential reversal.

falsification_conditions.condition: The blowoff score rises to 60 or higher within 14 days
falsification_conditions.what_it_would_mean: An increase in the blowoff score would signal extreme overbought conditions, directly contradicting the current pattern's implied bottoming behavior.

doctrine: If you can't list what would prove your call wrong, you don't have a real call.
